title: Getting Things Done (GTD) Method
title_zh: 尽管去做：GTD 时间管理方法
summary_en: A proven system for organizing tasks, reducing stress, and achieving clarity at work.
summary_zh: 一个成熟的任务管理体系，帮助组织事务、减轻压力并提升工作清晰度。
best_quote_en: Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them.
best_quote_zh: 大脑是用来产生想法的，而不是用来储存它们的。

title: Deep Work – Rules for Focused Success
title_zh: 深度工作：专注成功的规则
summary_en: Explains how cultivating focus and eliminating shallow work can maximize productivity.
summary_zh: 强调通过培养专注、减少浅层工作来最大化产出。
best_quote_en: Clarity about what matters provides clarity about what does not.
best_quote_zh: 明白什么重要，就会明白什么不重要。

title: International Energy Agency – Renewables 2024 Report
title_zh: 国际能源署：2024 可再生能源报告
summary_en: Detailed data and projections on solar, wind, and renewable power growth worldwide.
summary_zh: 关于太阳能、风能与全球可再生能源增长的详细数据与预测。
best_quote_en: Renewables are set to dominate global electricity growth in the next five years.
best_quote_zh: 未来五年，可再生能源将主导全球电力增长。

title: MIT OpenCourseWare – Artificial Intelligence
summary_en: Free lectures covering core AI concepts including search, knowledge representation, and learning.
summary_zh: 免费课程，涵盖搜索、知识表示与学习等核心 AI 概念。
best_quote_en: AI is the science of making machines do things that would require intelligence if done by humans.
best_quote_zh: 人工智能是让机器做本需人类智慧才能完成的事。

title: Stanford HAI – Robotics & Automation Research
title_zh: 斯坦福 HAI：机器人与自动化研究
summary_en: Explores the future of robotics in manufacturing, healthcare, and human-robot interaction.
summary_zh: 研究机器人在制造、医疗与人机交互中的未来应用。
best_quote_en: Robotics is no longer just about machines, but about partnerships between humans and technology.
best_quote_zh: 机器人不再只是机器，而是人类与技术的合作伙伴。

title: Harvard Business Review – Guide to Negotiation
title_zh: 哈佛商业评论：谈判指南
summary_en: Insights into negotiation strategies, cross-cultural communication, and deal-making.
summary_zh: 谈判策略、跨文化沟通与达成交易的实用指南。
best_quote_en: In negotiation, preparation is 80% of success.
best_quote_zh: 谈判中，准备工作占成功的 80%。

title: Alibaba International – Exporter’s Guide
title_zh: 阿里巴巴国际站：出口商指南
summary_en: Practical resources for exporters: product listing, buyer communication, and compliance tips.
summary_zh: 出口商实用资源：产品发布、买家沟通与合规建议。
best_quote_en: Trust is the currency of international trade.
best_quote_zh: 信任是国际贸易的货币。

title: BBC Learning English – Business English
summary_en: Courses focused on English for meetings, negotiations, and professional emails.
summary_zh: 聚焦会议、谈判与专业邮件的商务英语课程。
best_quote_en: The right words build trust across borders.
best_quote_zh: 正确的表达能跨越国界建立信任。
